title: Anaphrenium insigne

Anaphrenium insigne is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a relatively rare species, and further research is needed to fully understand its classification and characteristics.
uses: Anaphrenium insigne, also known as the New Zealand sandwort, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
